original_image_tags: Aged, greenish paper document page, likely a carbon copy or back of a page, with visible bleed-through of typed text from the reverse side. Page shows signs of wear, with a frayed right edge, corner folds, and three punched holes at the top. Multiple stamps and handwritten notations are present. The bleed-through text is reversed and largely illegible, but the foreground stamps and notes are clear.

elements.description: Page containing various stamps, handwritten annotations, and faint mirrored text from the reverse side. Visible elements include a red 'RECORDED' stamp, an inverted red rectangular stamp with text 'F.B.I. U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE' and 'RECEIVED', a handwritten date 'MAY 17 3 24 PM '51', and several handwritten notes including 'confidential' and 'File R 7051'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content (stamps, handwritten notes, faint reversed text) but Description B provides specific quoted text (e.g., 'RECORDED', 'F.B.I. U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE', 'MAY 17 3 24 PM 51') that Description A does not, without any contradiction on the described elements.
